params.name: The Argo
params.description: On Jan 21, 3603 BC, the Argo, laden with heroes, set sail on its momentous voyage. To reclaim his rightful throne, Easun led a band of young heroes on a quest to obtain the Golden Fleece. Along their arduous journey, they faced hardships and forged alliances. They experienced moments of joy as well as witnessed separations and sacrifices. Ultimately, with their unwavering courage and divine protection, they triumphantly accomplished their mission and returned to their homeland, earning admiratio …
